key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to sample usage and refresh the indicator, in seconds.

key.name: display-mode
key.description: How usage should appear in the panel: text, bar, or both.

key.name: show-icon
key.description: Whether to display the symbolic icon in the top panel.

key.name: panel-period
key.description: Which period to show in the panel: today or the last 7 days.

key.name: daily-goal-minutes
key.description: Target active GNOME usage time per day.

key.name: weekly-goal-minutes
key.description: Target active GNOME usage time across the last 7 days.

key.name: history-days
key.description: How many days of local usage history to keep.
